Character_The_Narrator.description: Lean man of middle years (roughly 35–50), pale sallow skin, dark disordered medium-length hair, intense bright eyes, hollow cheeks, thin lips; plain dark waistcoat over white shirtsleeves, dark period trousers.
Character_The_Narrator.voice_profile: Adult male, middle years; mid-to-higher pitch under strain; precise, controlled pace that can turn eager, fluent, then frantic; nervous energy held under forced calm; same voice on-camera and in V.O.
Character_The_Narrator.visual_lock: Same lean pale face, dark disordered hair, and intense bright eyes in every scene; plain dark waistcoat, white shirtsleeves, and dark period trousers as default look; never elderly, never white-haired; distinct from the frail Old Man and the uniformed officers.
Character_The_Narrator.performance_notes: In bare-room framing, direct address to camera/listener; in bedchamber flashbacks, plays against the Old Man and officers; composure cracks into raving only at the climax.

Character_The_Old_Man.description: Frail elderly man, thin build, white hair, aged lined face; one pale dull-blue eye with a filmy veil, the other ordinary; wears a simple pale nightshirt.
Character_The_Old_Man.voice_profile: Elderly male; thin, weak, low volume; brief startled cry and murmured replies; slow, fragile energy.
Character_The_Old_Man.visual_lock: Constant white hair, frail elderly frame, and the signature pale blue filmed eye that must not drift; pale simple nightshirt as default garment; never middle-aged or dark-haired; clearly older and weaker than the Narrator.
Character_The_Old_Man.performance_notes: Looks toward door/darkness and the Narrator, not the camera; terror and listening stillness more than speech.

Character_Officer_Reynolds.description: Adult man in his 50s, solid build, clean-shaven, short salt-and-pepper hair graying at the temples, weathered face with faint smile lines, steady calm gaze.
Character_Officer_Reynolds.voice_profile: Adult male; medium pitch; even, civil, official pace; polite authority without aggression.
Character_Officer_Reynolds.visual_lock: Constant salt-and-pepper hair graying at the temples and clean-shaven face — no mustache, no beard; oldest-looking and grayest-haired of the three officers.
Character_Officer_Reynolds.performance_notes: Addresses the Narrator and fellow officers; professional search demeanor; remains pleasantly chatty until the final spring-up.
